title: Stainless Steel Water Bottle 640 ml, One-Handed Opening, Leak-Proof, Thermal Flask for Sports and Outdoor, Orange
features: One-handed operation: innovative one-click opening allows effortless opening and drinking with just one hand - perfect for sports and on the go
Leak-proof: specially developed lid guarantees absolute tightness without drips or leaks - ideal for backpack and bag
Insulation performance: double-walled construction keeps drinks hot or cold for hours - ideal for coffee and cold refreshments
Practical design: 640 ml capacity and compact shape - fits in standard cup holders in the car
Suitable for outdoor use: robust and lightweight stainless steel construction makes the bottle the perfect companion for hiking, cycling and camping
description: This high-quality 640 ml insulated bottle is the perfect companion for your active lifestyle. With its innovative one-handed opening, it allows quick and convenient access to your drinks - ideal for sports, commuting or outdoor activities. The thoughtful, leak-proof locking mechanism ensures that your bag stays dry. Thanks to the excellent insulation, hot drinks stay warm for a long time and cold drinks refreshingly cool. Made of durable stainless steel, the thermal flask is not only durable, but also lightweight enough for extended hikes or bike rides. The sleek orange design fits perfectly into standard cup holders, making it the ideal travel companion. With 640 ml capacity, it offers enough space for your favourite drinks without being too bulky. A practical solution for those who value functionality and mobility.
